meta.title: Actian Design System 2026
meta.prompt: Create a presentation about the DS 2026 update

slides.name: Slide: Cover
slides.title: Actian Design System 2026
slides.subtitle: Tokens, components, and guidelines for consistent product experiences

slides.name: Slide: Token architecture
slides.title: Token architecture
slides.body:
The design system uses W3C DTCG format tokens organized in three layers:

1. Primitive tokens — raw color, spacing, and type values
2. Semantic tokens — purpose-driven aliases (e.g., theme-primary, text-secondary)
3. Component tokens — per-component bindings (e.g., button-bg, input-border)

All tokens support three themes: Actian (default), Studio, and Explorer.

slides.name: Slide: Spacing scale
slides.title: Spacing scale
slides.body: Eight-point grid with 7 named steps. Used consistently across all components and layouts.

slides.name: Slide: Back cover
slides.title: Thank you
